title: Harris 102012205 Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Medium Pile Mini Roller Sleeves Set, 4"
features: Easy to use: Convenient and simple use
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Great Mini Roller Set For Painting Small Areas of Walls & Ceilings Whats Included Contents 1 x 4" soft grip Roller Frame 2 x 4" Medium Pile Roller Sleeves 1 x 4" Roller Tray Doing a Project Don't forget.....to get the same paint finish team your 4" Seriously Good Roller Set up with the 9" Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Roller Set and our range of Seriously Good Walls and Ceilings Paint Brushes. Mid Range Roller Set Twin sleeve 4" mini roller set for use when painting smaller areas of walls and ceilings with emulsion paint. Extend your reach, the frame can be attached to the Harris Seriously Good Extension Pole. For best results rinse roller sleeves before use to remove any loose fibres. After use wash the sleeves in warm water to remove any excess paint. Allow to try naturally, standing up. Extend Your Reach Looking to extend your reach - simply attach the roller frame to a Harris Extension Pole with an attachment. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier HARRIS SERIOUSLY GOOD 4" TWIN SLEEVE WALLS & CEILINGS PAINT ROLLER SET HARRIS ESSENTIALS WALLS & CEILINGS 4" TWIN SLEEVE PAINT ROLLER SET HARRIS ULTIMATE 4" WALLS & CEILINGS PAINT ROLLER SET Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 3,707 4.5 out of 5 stars 4,127 4.4 out of 5 stars 792 Price £6.35 £ 6 . 35 £2.99 £ 2 . 99 £4.79 £ 4 . 79 Soft Grip Handle ✓ X ✓ Ideal for painting Walls & Ceilings smooth/semi smooth semi smooth smooth / semi smooth Replacement Sleeves available to purchase separately ✓ X ✓ Sleeve Type Woven Knitted & Foam Microfibre Expected paint coverage compared to other Harris rollers Better Good Best Splatter compared to other Harris Rollers A Little Some Very Little Compatible with Harris Extension Poles ✓ ✓ ✓
